zh.lifeSummary: 當John Webster III於1535年8月14日出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾可希頓時，他的父親John William Webster II25歲，母親Isabel Constance Kythin23歲。他於1559年10月1日與Isabel Rynzza Kittier在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他在英國英格蘭素瑞沃頓被列為lord of the manor of wotton。他去世於1594年10月11日在他的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Webster III于1535年8月14日出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾可希頓时，他的父亲John William Webster II25岁，母亲Isabel Constance Kythin23岁。他于1559年10月1日与Isabel Rynzza Kittier在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他在英国英格兰素瑞沃頓被列为lord of the manor of wotton。他去世于1594年10月11日在他的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Webster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: occupational name for a weaver, from Middle English webbester ‘weaver’ (Old English webbestre ‘female weaver’). By the time of surname formation, the gender distinction of the -stre suffix had almost completely disappeared. Compare Webb , Webber , and Weaver .

History: The name Webster was brought to North America from England independently by several different bearers in the 17th and 18th centuries. One John Webster settled in Ipswich, MA, in 1635; another John Webster (died 1661), ancestor of the lexicographer Noah Webster, emigrated to Cambridge, MA, c. 1631 and later became one of the founders of the colony of CT, of which he was appointed governor in 1656. Daniel Webster (1782–1852), politician and orator, was born in Salisbury, NH, a descendant of Thomas Webster, a prominent 17th-century citizen of Ipswich, MA, whose family had settled there around 1635, while he was still a child.

variants.name: Webb
meanings: English: occupational name for a weaver, from early Middle English webbe (Old English webba (masculine) or webbe (feminine), probably used of both male and female weavers). This word survived into Middle English long enough to give rise to the surname, but was already obsolescent as an agent noun; hence the secondary forms with the agent suffixes -er and -ster (see Webster , Webber and compare Weaver ).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish (Ashkenazic) surnames, cognates of 1, including Weber and Weberman.
History: Richard Webb, a Lowland Scot, was an admitted freeman of Boston in 1632, and in 1635 was one of the first settlers of Hartford, CT.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When John Webster III was born on 14 August 1535, in Cossington, Leicestershire, England, his father, John William Webster II, was 25 and his mother, Isabel Constance Kythin, was 23. He married Isabel Rynzza Kittier on 1 October 1559, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. His occupation is listed as lord of the manor of wotton in Wotton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. He died on 11 October 1594, in his hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Webster III est né le 14 août 1535, à Cossington, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, John William Webster II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabel Constance Kythin, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Rynzza Kittier le 1 octobre 1559, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est lord of the manor of wotton à Wotton, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1594, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Webster III am 14. August 1535 in Cossington, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John William Webster II 25 und seine Mutter Isabel Constance Kythin 23. Er hat am 1. Oktober 1559 in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Isabel Rynzza Kittier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als lord of the manor of wotton in Wotton, Surrey, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. Oktober 1594 im Alter von 59 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Webster III è nato il il 14 agosto 1535 nel Cossington, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, John William Webster II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Constance Kythin, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Isabel Rynzza Kittier il 1 ottobre 1559, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come lord of the manor of wotton nel Wotton, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 11 ottobre 1594, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Leicester, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Webster IIIが1535年8月14日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコシントンで生まれた時，父John William Webster IIは25歳，母Isabel Constance Kythinは23歳であった。1559年10月1日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでIsabel Rynzza Kittierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。イギリスイギリススリーウオットオンでの職業はlord of the manor of wottonと記録されている。彼は1594年10月11日に故郷で59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Webster III(이)가 1535년 8월 14일 영국 레이스스터실르 코징턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John William Webster II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Constance Kythin(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1559년 10월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 Isabel Rynzza Kittier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 수리 보턴에서 lord of the manor of wotton이었다. 그는 1594년 10월 11일 그의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에 묻혔다.

pt.14 August 1535–11 October 1594: 14 de agosto de 1535–11 de outubro de 1594
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Webster III nasceu em 14 de agosto de 1535, em Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John William Webster II, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Constance Kythin, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Rynzza Kittier em 1 de outubro de 1559, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como lord of the manor of wotton em Wotton, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1594, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Webster III родился 14 августа 1535 г. в местности коссингтон, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John William Webster II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Constance Kythin, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Rynzza Kittier 1 октября 1559 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии lord of the manor of wotton в местности воттон, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 11 октября 1594 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.14 August 1535–11 October 1594: 14 de agosto de 1535–11 de octubre de 1594
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Webster III nació el 14 de agosto de 1535, en Cossington, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John William Webster II, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabel Constance Kythin, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Isabel Rynzza Kittier el 1 de octubre de 1559, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era lord of the manor of wotton en Wotton, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 11 de octubre de 1594, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
